sentences.target: Je chasse les mouches de la cuisine.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃas le muʃ də la kɥizin/

translations.fr: Je chasse les mouches de la cuisine.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃas le muʃ də la kɥizin/
translations.en: I'm chasing the flies out of the kitchen.
translations.es: Ahuyento las moscas de la cocina.
translations.de: Ich vertreibe die Fliegen aus der Küche.
translations.vi: Tôi đuổi ruồi ra khỏi bếp.
translations.nl: Ik jaag de vliegen de keuken uit.
translations.hi: मैं रसोई से मक्खियों को भगा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διώχνω τις μύγες από την κουζίνα.
translations.nb: Jeg jager fluene ut av kjøkkenet.
translations.sv: Jag jagar ut flugorna ur köket.
translations.da: Jeg jager fluerne ud af køkkenet.
translations.ja: 台所からハエを追い出す。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb 'chasse'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; here means to chase/drive away; selects direct object 'les mouches'.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun 'mouches' as a definite direct object.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'chasse'.
Preposition indicating source/origin ('from'); introduces the complement specifying where they are chased from.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cuisine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de', indicating the place.

sentences.target: On veut chasser l'odeur de peinture.

translations.fr: On veut chasser l'odeur de peinture.
translations.en: We want to get rid of the paint smell.
translations.es: Queremos quitar el olor a pintura.
translations.ru: Мы хотим избавиться от запаха краски.
translations.pt: Queremos tirar o cheiro de tinta.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn khử mùi sơn.
translations.nl: We willen van de verfgeur af.
translations.hi: हम पेंट की गंध से छुटकारा पाना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να ξεφορτωθούμε τη μυρωδιά της μπογιάς.
translations.sv: Vi vill bli av med färglukten.
translations.ro: Vrem să scăpăm de mirosul de vopsea.
translations.ja: ペンキのにおいを取り除きたい。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun often meaning 'we'; takes 3rd person singular agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; modal verb of volition selecting an infinitive ('chasser').
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veut', meaning to chase away/get rid of.
Elided definite article (le/la) before a vowel sound; determiner of 'odeur' (feminine singular).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'chasser'.
Preposition linking 'odeur' to its complement; expresses 'smell of ...'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de' specifying the substance.

sentences.target: Tu chasses le chat du canapé.

translations.fr: Tu chasses le chat du canapé.
translations.en: You shoo the cat off the couch.
translations.de: Du verscheuchst die Katze vom Sofa.
translations.yue: 你將梳化上的隻貓趕走。
translations.pt: Você espanta o gato do sofá.
translations.vi: Bạn đuổi con mèo khỏi ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Je jaagt de kat van de bank.
translations.hi: तुम सोफे से बिल्ली को भगा रहे हो.
translations.el: Διώχνεις τη γάτα από τον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Du jager katten ned fra sofaen.
translations.sv: Du jagar ner katten från soffan.
translations.da: Du jager katten ned fra sofaen.
translations.ja: ソファから猫を追い払う。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'chasses'.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; main verb meaning to shoo/chase away.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'chat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'chasses'.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition meaning 'from the/of the', introducing the complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du', indicating location/source.

sentences.target: Ils chassent les moustiques avec ce spray.
sentences.reading: /il ʃas le mustik avɛk sə spʁe/

translations.fr: Ils chassent les moustiques avec ce spray.
translations.ipa: /il ʃas le mustik avɛk sə spʁe/
translations.en: They chase away mosquitoes with this spray.
translations.es: Ahuyentan los mosquitos con este spray.
translations.de: Sie vertreiben die Mücken mit diesem Spray.
translations.it: Allontanano le zanzare con questo spray.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们用这个喷雾赶走蚊子。
translations.yue: 佢哋用呢支噴霧趕走蚊。
translations.pt: Eles espantam os mosquitos com este spray.
translations.he: הם מרחיקים את היתושים עם התרסיס הזה.
translations.vi: Họ xua muỗi bằng loại xịt này.
translations.nl: Ze jagen de muggen weg met deze spray.
translations.hu: Ezzel a spray-vel elriasztják a szúnyogokat.
translations.hi: वे इस स्प्रे से मच्छरों को भगाते हैं.
translations.el: Απωθούν τα κουνούπια με αυτό το σπρέι.
translations.nb: De jager myggene bort med denne sprayen.
translations.id: Mereka mengusir nyamuk dengan semprotan ini.
translations.sv: De jagar bort myggen med den här sprayen.
translations.da: De jager myggene væk med denne spray.
translations.ja: このスプレーで蚊を追い払う。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person plural subject pronoun (masculine/mixed); subject of 'chassent'.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main verb meaning to chase/drive away.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'moustiques'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'chassent'.
Preposition of means/instrument; introduces how they chase them.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'spray'.
Common noun (loanword), masculine; object of the preposition 'avec' indicating the instrument.
